summary: Databricks workspace queries + class-2 write verbs (run-job). Apply mode triggers real billable actions; propose mode previews. Shells to REST API directly.

commands.summary: Return the authenticated Databricks user (SCIM /Me): userName, id, displayName.
List clusters in the workspace (cluster_id, cluster_name, state, driver_node_type_id).
List the most recent 20 jobs (job_id, name, creator_user_name, schedule).
Fetch a job by job_id plus its most recent 5 runs with life_cycle_state and result_state.
List workspace objects under an optional path (default /). 404 returns a graceful failure.

Trigger a Databricks job run via /api/2.2/jobs/run-now. Propose mode previews the payload without POSTing; apply mode starts a real billable cluster run. Class-2 — must be gated by work-graph approvalClass ≥ 2 or rejected by Ghost Shift.
